rules.action: Build one source blueprint round: prepare ASR, contact sheet, Part storyboards, and measured source rhythm in parallel; author evidence-backed rhythm beats and pass source_rhythm_qc before writing the downstream story/shot views.
Build a source-aligned storyboard, seam notes, contamination audit, and product action remapping from the passed story analysis.

rules.worker: $video-replication image batch / fast repair + $viral-replica loop adapter
rules.action: Directly batch-edit every required Part storyboard image from the passed storyboard set through the project GPT Image route. First run tools/image_batch_fanout.py plan, generate Part commands with per-Part --contract output/<job-id>/image-batch/contracts/partX_contract.json and per-Part invocation manifests, run independent Part commands in parallel when possible, apply the mandatory Shot-label metadata-only normalization defined by codex-imagegen-direct.md to every saved candidate, then run tools/image_batch_fanout.py merge before shared QC. Do not let concurrent Part tasks write output/<job-id>/image-batch/codex_imagegen_contract.json directly. Do not create a separate image sample or wait for sample review unless the job explicitly requests a sample stop. Write visual manifest schema v2 with hash-matched zero-panel-change label evidence; pass GPT Image contract QC, hard image QC, visual asset manifest QC, storyboard geometry / API-effect QC, cross-Part continuity QC, and skincare progression QC where required, then promote only passed images.

rules.reason: Image sample waits in normal mode; self-audit checker can approve internally
rules.action: In normal mode, stop for image sample review. In self-audit mode, run the independent checker and continue without user confirmation when the gate passes.

self_audit.worker: $video-replication checker image sample review + $viral-replica loop adapter
self_audit.action: Run the independent checker against the legacy image sample review gate and require passing visual asset manifest QC plus GPT Image contract QC. If the checker returns PASS, record the gate and continue without client taste review unless the user configured this stage as a stop point.

rules.worker: $video-replication image batch / fast repair + $viral-replica loop adapter
rules.action: Generate or fast-repair all required current-job AI改好分镜图 storyboard images through the project GPT Image route, apply the mandatory Shot-label metadata-only normalization defined by codex-imagegen-direct.md to every saved candidate, write visual manifest schema v2 with its evidence, pass GPT Image contract QC, run hard image QC, visual asset manifest QC, storyboard geometry / API-effect QC against the job-002 edit baseline, cross-Part continuity QC for multi-Part jobs, and promote only passed images.

Author one v6 source-locked necessary-only director_plan.json, require current schema-v3 source_rhythm with scene/camera/framing/action/timing/transition facts, exact-once one-source-beat-per-target-beat coverage with source-scaled timing for source-length work, and declared minimal line_edits/visual_edits plus visual_fidelity; preserve per-beat source lines/speaker modes and disable the product anchor when the source never says the name; render source-script and source-replication audits plus voiceover/shot-line/seam/definition-lock-exclusion prompts and only the selected web/API handoff, then run tools/pre_seedance_pack_qc.py for deterministic checks plus visual QC reuse. Stop before paid generation.
Write multi-part seam design: ending state, next-part motion start, speech boundary, and no-freeze plan.

Build clean Seedance prompts and material-role table only from approved visual manifest assets, shot rhythm, voiceover, and seam design; require passing Seedance prompt contract QC, visual asset manifest QC, storyboard geometry / API-effect QC, and cross-Part continuity QC before PASS.
For sound-enabled jobs, cut reference audio by sentence boundary and run ASR boundary QC. For silent jobs, write a skip note.

Build and QC Seedance taskCode request bodies or web-side handoff. Verify public image/audio URLs or final upload files, taskCode, image order, prompt contract coverage, visual asset manifest mapping, storyboard geometry / API-effect match, cross-Part continuity, and audio boundary mapping. Stop before paid or batch generation.

rules.reason: Seedance generation requires explicit client approval
rules.action: Stop before paid or batch Seedance generation.

Build one explicit tools/generation_fanout.py plan from the approved per-Part requests and exact approved task count; run hash-bound request/audio preflight before creating any reservation; after every preflight passes, persist the durable reservation before any provider call; run isolated Part submissions, polling, and downloads in parallel through tools/seedance_taskcode_runner.py with no automatic retry; then let the coordinator merge PASS completions into selected_outputs.json and record generation spend/state once. Do not model a separate subtitle track; accidental visible captions are checked once on the finished master.

Build or review an explicit caption-free keep-timeline edit_plan.json, render the approved Parts locally with FFmpeg, and verify the auditable final MP4 before subtitle inspection. Do not submit Vibe Editing or another paid MediaKit task in the MVP.

Inspect the exact caption-free finishing master once and classify it only as clean or burned_in with full-timeline evidence. Require one bound independent subtitle_presence_classification checker even for clean. Skip with zero paid tasks when clean; for burned-in subtitles, persist attempt 1 before exactly one MediaKit Pro task, count failures as spent, preserve the original, add subtitle_repair_quality to the same checker batch, and never retry automatically. Final QC must bind the passing active output path and hash.

Run objective final technical QC. If it passes, deliver the final video and mark the job done; subjective effect review belongs to the user after delivery. If it fails, allow at most one targeted Seedance retry.

Only for a valid explicit user request, add captions after final technical QC. Time and spell captions from the actual final audio, correct ASR against the approved spoken script, inherit caption grammar from the source video, render with HyperFrames, and pass hash-bound caption QC. Never ask Seedance to generate these captions.

rules.reason: after-wash reference waits in normal mode; self-audit checker can approve internally
rules.action: In normal mode, stop for after-wash reference review. In self-audit mode, run the independent checker and continue without user confirmation when the gate passes.

self_audit.worker: $video-replication checker after-wash reference review + $viral-replica loop adapter
self_audit.action: Run the independent checker against the after-wash reference gate. If the checker returns PASS, record the gate and continue unless the user configured this stage as a stop point.
